---
name: demo_deploy
description: Describe when to use this prompt
---

<!-- Tip: Use /create-prompt in chat to generate content with agent assistance -->

in the main scene in the demo, for any existing controls and applicable systems that are not in the scene integrate them into the main scene.  If the controls or sysems being integrated have a use-case then use them for that purpose otherwise create example names and structures and any other information for the controls or systems and use example placeholders in the main scene.  in demo_projects/controls_demo_feature.py add any missing example controls following the layout methods used in that feature.
